title: MC Dungeons Artifacts
description: MC Dungeons Artifacts (MCDAR) aims to (eventually) bring all of these artifacts, and more, from Minecraft Dungeons to Minecraft.
body: # Absence Explanation: I have, for the last few years, been losing my sight. It is to the point that I have trouble programming. As a result, development will be slowed even more. I apologise, in advance, if I am unable to update MCDX to the latest versions in a reasonable time. Thank you for all of your support! I am working on some tools that might be able to help me come back to programming. Hopefully I'll be back soon. --- [](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) # Introduction Have you ever wanted to have the artifacts from Minecraft Dungeons in your Minecraft world? Well, now that's possible! MC Dungeons Artifacts (MCDAR) aims to (eventually) bring all of these artifacts, and more, from Minecraft Dungeons to Minecraft. # Content Right now, there are more than 25 artifacts added to the game ranging from the explosive Blast Fungus to protective Totem of Shielding. They have been divided into Villager and Illager artifacts and can be found in either villages, mansions, pillager outposts, or dungeons. These artifacts cannot be crafted as it is assumed that the Villagers and Illagers have exclusive knowledge of how to make these magical items. ## Related Mods Would you like weapons as well? Well, check out [MC Dungeons Weapons](https://modrinth.com/mod/mcdw)! Would you like armors as well? Well, check out [MC Dungeons Armors](https://modrinth.com/mod/mcda)! Do you like the enchanting style of Dungeons? Check out [MC Dungeons Enchanting](https://modrinth.com/mod/mc-dungeons-enchanting)! [![Banner and link indicating sponsorship by Bisect Hosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/9deaa8f0-11c2-41f1-8f4f-32d2493b0912.png)](https://www.bisecthosting.com/Timefall) # Attributions/Special Thanks MC Dungeons Artifacts could not have ever existed without the amazing people mentioned below. They were instrumental to the inspiration and education needed to produce MC Dungeons Artifacts and the rest of MCDX (the MC Dungeons Suite). ## SeaOfPixels The continuing improvement to the visuals of this mod would not be possible without [Sea of Pixels](https://powerups4u.wixsite.com/seaofpixels). He has licensed his amazing art for MC Dungeons Armor and has worked with us to balance out some of the issues with MCDA as well. SeaOfPixels has allowed for his amazing models and textures from his resource pack [New Default+](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/newdefaultplus) to be used in MCDA. Please show him some support and check it out! If you like CIT texture packs, I'm sure that you'll have a blast! Texture and model used: Lightning Rod ## SattesKrokodil Sattes made the amazing drop art for the various mobs as well as the crafting art. Check him out at his [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/sattes) or check out the [Adventure Pack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/fabric-adventure-pack)! We'd love to see you over there! ## BackupCup Cup is an amazing pixel artist and is a budding Kotlin programmer. Thanks to them, we have a new suite of icons for MCDX and the icon for MCDAR is thanks to them! Please check out their projects [here](https://modrinth.com/user/BackupCup)! # Localisations/Translations Would you like to have MC Dungeon Artifacts translated into your language? Please submit your translation on the GitHub page and I'd be glad to add it! - English - `en_us` - [Chronos_Sacaria](https://modrinth.com/user/Chronos_Sacaria) - Spanish (Mexican) - `es_mx` - Binaris00 - Simplified Chinese - `cn_zh` - [Chronos_Sacaria](https://modrinth.com/user/Chronos_Sacaria) - Russian - `ru_ru` - Inky & [Iamnotagenius](https://modrinth.com/user/Iamnotagenius) # Patrons Without my patrons, I would not be able to devote as much time as I do to making these mods. ## Special thanks to - Deona (Custom) - 7z99 (Claymore) - EmmyAllEars (Claymore) - purejosh (Sword) - OnlyANeko (Sword) # FAQ - Q: Why does MCDAR not work with Optifine? - A: Optifine's code is closed source and extremely invasive. This is not a bad thing, in and of itself; but it makes it almost impossible to troubleshoot anything whilst still respecting the licencing that sp614x uses. So, out of respect for them so as to not have to explore their code without permission, we simply do not support it. Please consider the following alternatives: - FPS Enhancement and Optimisations -- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) (Fabric); [Rubidium](https://modrinth.com/mod/rubidium) (Forge) - Shaders -- [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) (Fabric); [Oculus](https://modrinth.com/mod/oculus) (Forge) - Rendering Compatibility -- [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium) (Fabric); [Reforgium](https://modrinth.com/mod/reforgium) (Forge) - Q: Can I use your mod in my modpack? - A: Absolutely! I only ask that you provide a link back to this page. - Q: I've seen your mod on other sites. Did you post it and are they safe? - A: I have not, nor do I plan to, post my mod on any other sites than Modrinth, Curseforge or our GitHub page. If you have downloaded this mod from somewhere else: 1. It isn't from us 2. It may have some kind of malicious files or have been modified in some way. I urge you to delete the file, run a full virus and malware scan and, if you want to use MC Dungeons Artifacts, come and download it on Modrinth, CurseForge or from GitHub. - Q: 1.12.2? - A: Given the massive strides that have been made with Minecraft's code since 1.12 and the subsequent changes to the underlying code, a 1.12.x port is simply untenible. Please see this [link](https://howoldisminecraft1122.today/) for more information. - Q: Will the mod be ported to 1.x.x? - A: MC Dungeons Weapons, MC Dungeons Armors and MC Dungeons Artifacts are only developed for the latest version of Minecraft. Backports should not be expected. - Q. Forge? - A. MC Dungeons Artifacts is compatible with Forge by using the following mods: [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector), [Connector Extras](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector-extras) and the [Forgified Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/forgified-fabric-api) which are being developed by Su5eD. Please make sure to follow all of their instructions in order to have the best experience. - Note: If you wish to use [Clumps](https://modrinth.com/mod/clumps), please make sure to use the Fabric version as we rely on a method that is not present in the Forge version. - If you are looking for a mod that was specially built for Forge with similar content, please consider checking out [Dungeons Gear](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dungeons-gear) by the_infamous_1.
